channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead cat found in Ravensbourne River, 13th April
item.description:
The cat is stuck in a pile of branches and twigs on the Warren Avenue Playing Fields side of the river directly behind my property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensmead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped trailer tent, 13th April
item.description:
Been left here since Wednesday 8th April (unknown time)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Corinthian Road, 13th April
item.description:
Fly tipped items including a mattress, broken washing basket and high chair on the pavement on Corinthian Road. I don't know how long the items have been there but we often park along this road for a child's after school club and there are frequently fly tipped items either here or half in the hedges - I would think some CCTV cameras might help identify the offenders or put people off dumping items here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Corinthian Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and old bed on pavement, 13th April
item.description:
Just noticed it there today
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike left dangerously in the way, 13th April
item.description:
This bike has been left directly across the dipped kerb at this junction, creating a hazard and making it difficult for wheelchairs and prams to cross safely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Silicon Way, Hoxton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish along grass verge, 13th April
item.description:
Grass cut today but rubbish along grass verge from number 1 to number 11 Cray Avenue and grass not cleared at corner of Cray Avenue/St Andres Drive both need cleaning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This waa reported and now norris skips have returned it, 13th April
item.description:
Total and the most and I have just witnessed most steps putting it back do they own the road? This contraption needs to be destroyed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been parked up half on pavement half on road for the last 3wks with no one returning to it, 13th April
item.description:
Parked up not moved for 3wks Half on pavement half in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light always on, 13th April
item.description:
Light on all day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes full of water drenching pedestrians, 13th April
item.description:
Potholes have been here for months. They have had two lots of minor repairs. Theybrepeatedly get worse and fill with water. People cannot wait for their bus. Cars have to drive through because of wide vehicles stopped at the traffic lights and they are coming round a blind corner on a junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Rise, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood panel and pallets left by garage., 13th April
item.description:
Wood panel and pallets left by garage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fossington Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ballard at the bottom on gravel hill, 13th April
item.description:
The Ballard requires to be refitted as it’s Leaning over which could cause accident in blown into the road. The Ballard has been like this for over 1.5 weeks hopefully someone will reinstall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall leaning, 13th April
item.description:
This wall is damaged and leaning and if collapses, will at least block the pedestrian footpath and at worst, hurt someone. I have reported before. Please inspect, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penn Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 13th April
item.description:
The car is damaged with 1 wheel missing. The front number plate is also missing so I suspect no Sorn and as such can be removed even if it is on private land.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riefield Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Helium gas cylinders besides footpath, 13th April
item.description:
2 x Gas bottles dumped on footpath opposite Chaucer road opposite Burns close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaucer Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive dog fouling., 13th April
item.description:
Dog fouling, poo in large quantities everywhere, certain dog owners are not picking up after their animals. Young women regularly takes her dog to defecate twice a day, morning and evening and refuses to pick up afterwards. Pit bull type dogs are also pooing late at night all along the footpath. The smell is incredibly bad, foul. Probably about 20 poos all along the path. Two things 1 a cleansing team with disinfectant cleans the area. 2 a warden, preferably plain clothed patrols this area and fines them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle on public road, 13th April
item.description:
Untaxed vehicle at the end of CRUSOE ROAD, DA8 1PJ. On the Gov.uk website, it shows that the tax ran out 01/02/2026, however it is still on a public road. Vehicle is a Blue VAUXHALL.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crusoe Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 13th April
item.description:
Abandoned trolley In alleyway off palace view/rafford way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council collection bin forgotten by bin men and left on the street. Now outside 23 chaffinch road. This was from 11th April Bin collection, 13th April
item.description:
Council collection bin forgotten by bin men and left on the street. Now outside 23 chaffinch road. This was from 11th April Bin collection
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaffinch Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Trolley, 13th April
item.description:
Abandoned trolly in alley between elmfield park and high st

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3 - 5, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
